description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint and a modern, clean-lined design. The exterior is clad in light pinkish brick, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a dark overhang, a single garage door, and a paved driveway leading to the street. The property is landscaped with a green lawn, a circular flower bed with a tree, and small shrubs along the sides. The roof is primarily flat, with a slight overhang above the garage and entry. The house appears spacious, with multiple rooms visible through the open roof structure.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large windows, a flat roof, and landscaped front yard featuring a driveway and tree. The design is clean and symmetrical, with a prominent entryway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and landscaped yard with a tree and flower bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and the driveway curving around the side with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with large windows and a covered area, as well as the open backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, lawn, and the tree in the front yard from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a dark overhang, single door, small steps, and minimal decorative elements
